name: DNA Extraction (Phenol–Chloroform)
description: Genomic DNA extraction: cells are lysed and proteins digested, then DNA is purified either by organic (phenol:chloroform) extraction or by silica-column binding, precipitated/eluted, and accepted only when the A260/A280 purity ratio is acceptable.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Cell/tissue sample"]
    N2["Lysis buffer + proteinase K"]
    N3["Lyse cells; digest protein"]
    N4{"Purification method?"}
    N5["Phenol:chloroform extract"]
    N6["Bind DNA to silica column"]
    N7["Wash column"]
    N8["Ethanol precipitate"]
    N9["Elute / resuspend DNA"]
    N10{"A260/A280 ~ 1.8?"}
    N11["Purified genomic DNA"]

    N1 --> N3
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 -->|organic| N5
    N4 -->|column| N6
    N5 --> N8
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N9
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 -->|re-extract| N3
    N10 -->|yes| N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Lysis buffer + proteinase K
nodeDetails.detail: Detergent lysis buffer with proteinase K

nodeDetails.label: Lyse cells; digest protein
nodeDetails.detail: Disrupt membranes and digest proteins to release DNA

nodeDetails.label: Purification method?
nodeDetails.detail: Choose organic extraction or silica-column purification

nodeDetails.label: Phenol:chloroform extract
nodeDetails.detail: Partition proteins to organic phase; recover aqueous DNA

nodeDetails.label: Bind DNA to silica column
nodeDetails.detail: Bind DNA to silica in chaotropic salt

nodeDetails.label: Wash column
nodeDetails.detail: Ethanol washes remove salts and contaminants

nodeDetails.label: Ethanol precipitate
nodeDetails.detail: Precipitate DNA from aqueous phase with ethanol

nodeDetails.label: Elute / resuspend DNA
nodeDetails.detail: Elute or resuspend purified DNA in buffer

nodeDetails.label: Purified genomic DNA
nodeDetails.detail: Clean genomic DNA ready for downstream use

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Molecular Cloning: A Laboratory Manual (3rd ed.)
Rapid and simple method for purification of nucleic acids
sources.authors: Boom, R.; Sol, C. J.; Salimans, M. M.; Jansen, C. L.; Wertheim-van Dillen, P. M.; van der Noordaa, J.

sources.title: Isolation of High-Molecular-Weight DNA Using Organic Solvents
